title: Average line items per order
prompt: Among completed orders that have line items, what is the average number of line-item rows per order? Count the line-item rows for each order, then average across orders. Return a single column avg_lines rounded to 2 decimals.

generic: JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id

hints: First count line items per order in a CTE.
Then take AVG of those counts.
